inventory.location: 412 Summit Avenue, Apt 3B, Jersey City, NJ 07307
inventory.description: Home and kitchen equipment register. Kept for renters insurance and for planning what moves to Rootstock.

item.name: Pro 600 stand mixer with pasta roller
item.note: The splurge. Roller does the tasting-menu pasta.

item.name: Cast iron collection
item.note: Built up over years. Browns the Sunday stew meat right.

item.name: Gas range, tenant installed
item.note: Replaced the landlord's electric range, with written consent.

item.name: Japanese chef knife set
item.note: Kept on the magnetic strip. Sharpened weekly.

item.name: Pour-over coffee setup
item.note: Multiple cups a day. Never drip.

item.name: Hanging pot rack and copper pans
Smartphone, current model
item.note: Single line. Vendor calls, sourcing notes.

item.name: Laptop, older model
item.note: Business plan work, email, recipe documentation. Slow but it holds.

item.name: Cookbook shelf, working collection
item.note: French technique, Italian, baking, plus the business titles.

item.name: Grandmother's handwritten recipe binder
item.note: Not for sale, not replaceable. The whole reason for Rootstock.

summary.note: Scheduled items match the renters policy. Estimates are conservative.
